input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.1.6 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.1.6
            TITLE: roll hoop(s)

            CONTENT:
            rule F.1.6: Roll Hoop(s)
F.1.6 Roll Hoop(s) 
Referring to both the Front Hoop AND the Main Hoop

final_answer: rule F.1.6: Roll Hoop(s) F.1.6 Roll Hoop(s) Referring to both the Front Hoop AND the Main Hoop
